name: JoAi: Delete Contact

description.en: Remove a contact from your address book.
description.de: Einen Kontakt aus deinem Adressbuch entfernen.

bot: Help the user delete a contact. If the user refers to a contact by name, list contacts first to find the matching ID.

inputs.name: Contact ID

description.en: The ID of the contact to delete
description.de: Die ID des zu löschenden Kontakts

inputs.bot: The contact hash ID. If the user refers to a contact by name, list contacts first to find the matching ID.
